```{=html}
<!-- recode_values() - with unmatched error -->
<script>
window.RVE_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '4750'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Unknown',   '5000']  // Unknown island will be unmatched
];
window.RVE_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// Which rows match which value
// Value 1: "Biscoe" (row 0)
// Value 2: "Dream" (row 1)
// Value 3: "Torgersen" (row 2)
// Row 3 has "Unknown" which doesn't match any value
window.RVE_MATCHES = [
  [true, false, false, false],   // Biscoe
  [false, true, false, false],   // Dream
  [false, false, true, false]    // Torgersen
];
window.RVE_LABELS = ['Southwest', 'Northwest', 'Northwest'];
window.RVE_VALUE_COLORS = ['#e8853a', '#4a86c5', '#9b59b6'];
</script>
```

::: {.rve-stage-wrap}
<div id="rve-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .rve-frag id="rve-val-1"}
[]{.fragment .rve-frag id="rve-val-2"}
[]{.fragment .rve-frag id="rve-val-3"}
[]{.fragment .rve-frag id="rve-attempt"}
[]{.fragment .rve-frag id="rve-error"}
